subHeadings.poweredOff: The Smart Panel has been successfully powered off

config.edited: System configuration has been successfully updated

manage.confirmRestart: Are you sure you want to restart the device? This action will temporarily interrupt functionality.
manage.confirmPowerOff: Are you sure you want to power off the device? It will need to be manually turned on again.
manage.confirmFactoryReset: Are you sure you want to erase all data and restore the device to its factory settings? This action is irreversible.
manage.confirmRestartGateway: Are you sure you want to restart the gateway? Connected displays will temporarily lose connectivity until the gateway is back online.
manage.confirmPowerOffGateway: Are you sure you want to power off the gateway? All connected displays will lose connectivity. The gateway will need to be manually turned on again.
manage.confirmFactoryResetGateway: Are you sure you want to factory reset the gateway? This will erase all gateway data and reset all connected displays. This action is irreversible.
manage.waitingToBoot: Waiting for panel to boot up...
manage.serviceRestartTakesTooLong: Service restart is taking longer than expected. Please check the panel manually.
manage.rebootTakesTooLong: Reboot is taking longer than expected. Please check the panel manually.
manage.rebootFailed: Failed to reboot the Smart Panel. Please try again or check the device manually.
manage.powerOffFailed: Failed to power off the Smart Panel. Please try again or check the device manually.
manage.factoryResetSuccess: All data has been cleared. Let’s start fresh — sign in to begin.
manage.factoryResetFailed: Failed to factory reset the Smart Panel. Please try again or check the device manually.

misc.requestError: Something went wrong, please try again later.

update.confirmInstall: Are you sure you want to update to version {version}?
update.majorUpdateWarning: This is a major version update to {version}. Major updates may contain breaking changes. Are you sure you want to proceed?
update.updateStarted: Update process has been started. The system will restart automatically.
update.updateFailed: Update failed. Please check the system logs for details.
update.checkFailed: Failed to check for updates. Please try again later.
update.installFailed: Failed to start the update. Please try again later.

system.about: FastyBird Smart Panel is a home automation app that enables seamless integration with your smart devices, offering enhanced control and monitoring capabilities.

manage.rebootDevice: Restart the device to apply changes or resolve issues.
manage.rebootGateway: Restart the gateway to apply changes or resolve issues. Connected displays will temporarily lose connectivity.
manage.powerOffGateway: Power off the gateway completely. Connected displays will lose connectivity.
manage.factoryResetDevice: Restore the device to its original factory settings.
manage.factoryResetGateway: Erase all gateway data and reset all connected displays to factory settings.
manage.restartServiceDescription: Quick restart of the application only. Settings and connections are preserved.
manage.restartSystemDescription: Full device reboot including the operating system. Takes longer but resolves deeper issues.
manage.factoryResetInProcess: Smart Panel is reset to factory state...
manage.factoryResetWaiting: Waiting for Smart Panel to restart after factory reset...
manage.factoryResetTimeout: Factory reset is taking longer than expected. Please check the device manually.
manage.poweredOff: You can close this window — no further action is required.

update.upToDate: Your system is up to date.

systemLogs.noLogs: No any application logs were recorded.
systemLogs.noFilteredLogs: No any application logs found matching the active filter criteria
systemLogs.noMessage: This log entry is without additional message

texts.aboutLanguageSettings: Configure the interface language, timezone, time format, and measurement units for the Smart Panel. These settings affect how dates, times, temperatures, and measurements are displayed throughout the system.
texts.aboutSystemSettings: Manage system-wide logging configuration. Select which log severity levels to monitor and display in the application logs.
texts.aboutHouseModeSettings: Set the current house mode to control how the Smart Panel and connected devices behave. Home mode is for normal occupancy, Away mode for when no one is home, and Night mode for sleeping hours.

numberFormat.title: Number Format
numberFormat.description: Number display format for thousands and decimal separators

logLevels.title: Log Levels
logLevels.placeholder: Select which log levels should be monitored

validation.required: At least one log level must be selected
validation.min: At least one log level must be selected
